name: No Bake Cookies 4
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sugar, cocoa, margarine, and milk in a large saucepan.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil for 1 minute over medium heat.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the peanut butter, quick oats, coconut, and vanilla.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto a greased cookie sheet or spread it evenly into a greased 9x13 inch pan.
5. Allow to cool completely before cutting and serving.
Easier if you have the second set of ingredients measured out before starting.
Use quick oats; regular oats will not work.
